title: Private Instruction: Jazz
catalogDescription: Guides students through the process of historical examination of jazz while discovering and developing musical originality. Addresses jazz methods and approaches, aiming for mastery in jazz performance in a one-on-one environment with instrumentalists chosen from the core jazz instrumentation of trumpet, piano, bass, and drums. Offered: AWSp.
